violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed items in refrigerator and walk in cooler that were not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed outside of appliances need to be cleaned.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration . Observed sanitizer in ware washer was at 25ppm.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed some plates and bowls were not inverted during storage.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked tiles in food prep area.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezer in food prep area.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Observed items in walk in cooler temping at 44F.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed nothing date marked in walk in cooler, or refrigerators.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed aluminum foil taped to side of freezer. Foil and tape are not cleanable surfaces.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed food prep counters have dried food on them.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed silverware not inverted during storage. -Observed dinner ware not inverted during storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls and ceiling in food prep area need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked and broken tiles in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
